---
name: Security vulnerability
description: Do not report vulnerabilities publicly.
title: "security: use private reporting"
labels: [security]
---

Please do not disclose vulnerabilities publicly in an issue.

Use GitHub private vulnerability reporting if enabled, or follow the private
contact process in `SECURITY.md`. Do not include secrets, PII, real target data,
or exploit logs from systems you do not own or lack written authorization to
test.
